text: A rectangular picture frame has a length of n cm and a width of 3 cm. The total distance around the frame is 20 cm. What is the value of n?
generatorSolution: The perimeter of a rectangle is found by adding all four sides together: n + 3 + n + 3 = 20. This simplifies to 2n + 6 = 20. Subtract 6 from both sides: 2n = 14. Divide both sides by 2: n = 7. So the length is 7 cm.
